chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1439 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 22.12.2021 Mr. Ali Ahmed Zaman Patoli advocate for petitioner along with petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh. -.-.-. Learned Additional Advocate General Sindh has filed comments of respondents No.1 and 2, which are taken on reocrd. Mr. Muhammad Jameel Ahmed advocate has filed power on behalf of Akhtar Ali Rind and states that he is going to file an application under Order 1 Rule 10 CPC for joining as respondent as his client has been residing in the same property for the last 12 years which he has purchased from maternal cousin of petitioner after a compromise decree was passed in F.C. Suit No. 388 of 2007. Be that as it may, the petition before us filed by the petitioner is to seek direction for protection. Learned Additional Advocate General Sindh undertakes that petitioner would not be harassed and will be dealt in accordance with law. Regarding the issue about civil rights of the parties, learned defense counsel submits that he will avail remedy before the relevant forum by filing complaint in Illegal Dispossession Act and suit for declaration as well as permanent injunction before the relevant civil court and seeks disposal of this petition in the above terms. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the above terms along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
